field_values.action_summary: As Carter and Kantos Kan attempt to depart, Zodangan air patrols intercept them. Kantos Kan dives into darkness to evade capture, leaving Carter to engage in a high-speed aerial chase. Carter uses Heliumite gearing to increase speed but is struck by a projectile from a cruiser, causing his machine to fail.
field_values.camera_intent: Dynamic tracking shots (chase); Wide aerial vistas; Shaky cam/handheld (impact/plunge); Close-ups (frantic piloting)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Flight paths of machines must maintain relative velocity
Directional vector of projectile fire from cruiser to Carter
Heliumite gearing speed increase vs. baseline machine speed
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH023_SC003

## Production Intent
Execute a high-velocity aerial chase sequence through Martian airspace involving multiple flight crafts and projectile combat. The sequence must transition from organized evasion to chaotic mechanical failure via kinetic impact.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- kantos_kan
- Zodangan Air Patrols

## Required Environments
- martian_sky_aerial_corridors
- darkness_void

## Continuity Constraints
- Flight paths of machines must maintain relative velocity
- Directional vector of projectile fire from cruiser to Carter
- Heliumite gearing speed increase vs. baseline machine speed

## Beat List
- BT001: Interception of Carter and Kantos Kan
- BT002: Kantos Kan's evasion dive
- BT003: High-speed pursuit with Heliumite gearing
- BT004: Projectile strike and machine failure
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
